easy.title: Create a 'My Favorite Things' Page Using Various Elements
easy.description: Build an HTML page about your favorite things that demonstrates at least 5 different element types: headings, paragraphs, an image, a link, a list, and a horizontal rule. Use proper block and inline elements correctly.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>My Favorite Things</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Add your content here -->
</body>
</html>
easy.solution:
My Favorite Things

My Favorite Book

I love The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho. It is an inspiring story about following your dreams.

My Favorite Food

Here are my top picks:

  • Pizza
  • Sushi
  • Ice Cream

My Favorite Place

Learn More

Visit this website for more inspiration.

Made with HTML elements

medium.title: Build a Product Comparison Page with Tables and Lists
medium.description: Create a product comparison page for smartphones. Include: a heading hierarchy (<h1> for title, <h2> for categories, <h3> for product names), a comparison table with <thead>, <tbody>, and <tfoot>, a features list using <ul> with <li>, a description list (<dl>) for specifications, an <aside> with buying tips, and a <figure> with <figcaption> for an image.
medium.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Smartphone Comparison</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Build a product comparison page -->
</body>
</html>
medium.solution:
Smartphone Comparison Guide 2026

  • Storage: 128GB

Detailed Specifications

Phone X
Flagship model with pro-grade camera system

Buying Tips

Consider your budget and daily usage before deciding. Battery life matters most for heavy users.
